name: Take the free online colour test - how good is your vision?
description: Take the free online colour test - how good is your vision.

step.name: Custom White Balance: Always perform a custom white balance in your camera to...
step.text: Custom White Balance: Always perform a custom white balance in your camera to obtain accurate colour representation.

step.name: Use Adobe RGB: Set your camera to use the Adobe RGB colour space, which offer...
step.text: Use Adobe RGB: Set your camera to use the Adobe RGB colour space, which offers a wider colour gamut than sRGB.

step.name: Calibrate Your Monitor: Use a device like the Spyder or Colour Munki to calib...
step.text: Calibrate Your Monitor: Use a device like the Spyder or Colour Munki to calibrate your computer monitor, ensuring that the colours you see on screen are true to life.

step.name: Calibrate Your Printer: Calibrate your printer for different ink and paper ty...
step.text: Calibrate Your Printer: Calibrate your printer for different ink and paper types. Most printer manufacturers provide colour profiles for each paper type online, so make sure to download and use them.

step.name: Maintain Consistent Colour Profiles: Keep your colour profile consistent thro...
step.text: Maintain Consistent Colour Profiles: Keep your colour profile consistent throughout any editing in software. Stick to Adobe RGB for accurate colour representation.
